article_title: B.C. Reg. 288/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Telecommunications Property Assessment Rates Rise for 2025 Under Updated BC Valuation Regulation
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the Telecommunications Corporations Valuation Regulation, raising per-unit valuation figures (e.g. from $597 to $640 and $470 to $504) and updating base installation cost tables effective 2025.
briefs.action_required: Review your 2025 property assessment notice to confirm updated telecom valuation rates have been applied correctly.

key_dates.label: BC Telecommunications Corporations Valuation Regulation 2025 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 288/2024 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
